title: sedum obtrullatum
intro: Sedum obtrullatum, also known as the Mexican stonecrop, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenes. The medicinal properties of Sedum obtrullatum have been linked to various health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Sedum obtrullatum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
